title: Craftable Dirt│可合成泥土
description: Added Dirt recipe.│添加了泥土配方。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
Dirt can be crafted using Rotten Flesh and Cobblestone, Cobbled Deepslate or Black Stone. These materials correspond to the two components of dirt: the detritus produced by weathering stone, and the organic matter provided by biological debris. This makes the dirt easier to mass produce.│用腐肉和圓石、深板岩圓石或黑石可以合成泥土，這些原料對應了泥土中的兩種成分：石頭風化後產生的碎石和生物殘骸提供的有機質。這使得泥土更容易量產。

**※You can check the specific craft recipe in "Gallery"│你可以在"Gallery"中查看具體合成配方**
